section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
## Periodic Transaction Report

**NAME:** Rohit Khanna

**OFFICE TELEPHONE:** (202) 225-2631

- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA — District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: ______ (File an original and 1 copy)

**Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering?** [ ] Yes  [X] No

*If you answered "yes" to this question, please contact the Committee on Ethics for further guidance.*

**Please indicate whether this is an initial report or an amended report.** [X] Initial Report  [ ] Amendment

**Date of Report Being Amended:** (blank)

*A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late.*

Stamped: HAND DELIVERED — LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER — 18 DEC 10 PM 12:56 — U.S. House of Representatives (For Official Use Only)

**Transaction grid (blank on this page):** Columns — Full Asset Name; Type of Transaction (Purchase / Sale / Exchange); Date of Transaction (MM/DD/YY); Date Notified of Transaction (MM/DD/YY); Amount of Transaction A–K (A $1,001-$15,000; B $15,001-$50,000; C $50,001-$100,000; D $100,001-$250,000; E $250,001-$500,000; F $500,001-$1,000,000; G $1,000,001-$5,000,000; H $5,000,001-$25,000,000; I $25,000,001-$50,000,000; J Over $50,000,000; K Transaction in a Spouse or Dependent Child Asset over $1,000,000).

Example row (greyed): JT — Mega Corp. Common Stock — Sale — 02/05/015 — 03/07/15 — column B.

**Please see the attached**
